curation.synopsis: Perturabo drove the Iron Warriors fleet into the heart of a dying star at the edge of the Eye of Terror, and only one mind plotted the course through. The Prime Navigator of the Iron Blood comes back from that passage hollowed out, his third eye burned open onto something that should never have been seen, and is sealed away in a stone cell beneath the flagship so that no one else can hear what now whispers to him. The story is the long, broken monologue he gives to his keepers and to himself: a portrait of an old Navigator family in the Warmaster's service, of the price the warp asks of those who pilot armies through it, and of the further crossings that are still to come.

flags.reason: the Prime Navigator is the sole POV but is not named in available coverage
